data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 3 advisory). Remediating: (1) FALSE-POSITIVE on dedup (adv #3, the load-bearing one): 'computed' is defined POST-DEDUP — update_one counts links_computed as only the add-entries it actually ATTEMPTS after the already-present (direction-agnostic) skip, so a fully-deduped/idempotent re-sync has links_computed==0 and the canary does NOT fire. comments/labels have no dedup so computed=len(entries). The canary is computed>0 && applied==0 per kind. A dedicated test asserts the dedup-skip path triggers NO canary. (2) warn-first rollback (adv #2): default = warn (telemetry + WARNING + outcome['silent_noop']); REBAR_RECONCILER_FAIL_SILENT_NOOP=1 promotes to hard-fail (sets outcome['error']); a test asserts BOTH flag states (flip = warn<->fail, no other code change). (3) telemetry: links/comments/labels_applied surfaced on every outbound update outcome + the per-mutation RECON batch_outcome line, parity with apply_inbound's links_applied. Out of scope (YAGNI): configurable threshold.
